witnesses.description: A finite triangular-number prefix represented as an ordinary generating polynomial.
A finite Cauchy product replay for two ordinary generating polynomials.
A bounded Fibonacci prefix satisfies (1 - x - x^2)F(x) = x through degree 6.

checks.claim: The listed ordinary generating polynomial has the documented coefficient prefix.
checks.notes: The validator checks each requested coefficient index against the polynomial coefficient list.

checks.claim: The listed product coefficients are the Cauchy convolution of the two finite generating polynomials.
checks.notes: The validator multiplies the two coefficient polynomials exactly.

checks.claim: The listed Fibonacci prefix satisfies the standard generating-function identity through degree 6.
checks.notes: The validator checks the recurrence prefix and then verifies the truncated polynomial identity.

checks.claim: The listed incorrect product is the Cauchy convolution of the two finite generating polynomials.
checks.notes: The validator recomputes the exact Cauchy product and finds the first incorrect coefficient.

checks.claim: General generating-function theorems require future Lean resources.

data.target_theorem_shape: closed-form extraction, recurrence solving, analytic convergence, and asymptotic coefficient estimates
data.future_checker: Lean module with no sorryAx dependencies

checks.notes: The finite rows are checked by exact coefficient replay; general generating-function theory remains a proof-assistant horizon.
